PlanningBench starts from real planning scenarios and abstracts practical workflows into a structured taxonomy of more than 30 task types, subtasks, constraint families, and difficulty factors. Guided by this taxonomy, a constraint-driven synthesis pipeline instantiates self-contained planning problems with adaptive difficulty control, quality filtering, and instance-level verification checklists. This shifts planning data construction from fixed benchmark collection to controllable generation while preserving realistic task grounding. We use PlanningBench to evaluate open-source and closed-source frontier LLMs, and find that current models still struggle to produce complete solutions under coupled constraints. Beyond evaluation, reinforcement learning on verified PlanningBench data improves performance on unseen planning benchmarks and broader instruction-following tasks. Further analysis suggests that determinate or well-specified optimal solutions provide clearer reward signals and more stable training dynamics. Overall, PlanningBench provides a controllable source of planning data for diagnosing and improving generalizable planning abilities in LLMs.

</details>


### [447] [Governance by Construction for Generalist Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20874)
*Segev Shlomov,Iftach Shoham,Alon Oved,Ido Levy,Sami Marreed,Harold Ship,Offer Akrabi,Sergey Zeltyn,Avi Yaeli,Nir Mashkif*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出CUGA的策略系统，一种模块化的策略即代码层，与通用大语言模型代理结合，在不进行模型微调的情况下实现可预测、可审计和符合合规要求的复合工作流行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业代理需要在工具和界面间自主运行，但生产部署必须从构建之初就具备治理能力，需明确允许的操作、人工监督时机及信息暴露范围，而无需为每个领域重建代理。

Method: 设计了一个运行时治理架构，在代理执行的关键阶段实施策略干预，包括五个结构检查点：规划前的意图守卫（Intent Guard）、系统提示中的推理引导（Playbook）、工具调用边界的使用规范（Tool Guide）、高风险操作的人机协同审批（Tool Approvals）以及输出阶段的响应过滤与结构化（Output Formatter）。

Result: 在医疗场景中演示了动态剧本注入、意图守卫拦截有害请求、高风险操作的人机审批等多层级策略干预效果，验证了该策略系统能提升企业代理系统的部署速度、安全性、策略遵从性与执行一致性。

Conclusion: 该策略即代码方法将治理嵌入代理执行全流程，而非事后补救，为通用大语言模型代理在企业环境中的安全、合规、可审计部署提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Enterprise agents are increasingly expected to operate autonomously across tools and interfaces, yet production deployments require governance by construction. Systems must specify which actions are allowed, when human oversight is required, and what information may be exposed, without rebuilding the agent for each domain. This demo presents CUGA's policy system, a modular policy-as-code layer that composes with a generalist LLM agent to deliver predictable, auditable, and compliance-aware behavior in compound workflows without model fine-tuning. We present a runtime governance architecture that enforces policy interventions at every critical stage of execution. Rather than passively constraining behavior, policies intercept the agent at five structural checkpoints: upstream of planning (Intent Guard), within the system prompt to steer reasoning (Playbook), at the tool-call boundary to enforce proper usage (Tool Guide), outside the reasoning loop as a Human-in-the-Loop gate for high-risk actions (Tool Approvals), and at the output stage to filter and structure the final response (Output Formatter). Together, these stages embed governance continuously across the agent's execution pipeline rather than treating it as an afterthought. Using a healthcare scenario and a multi-layered enforcement intervention, the demo shows dynamic playbook injection for structured tool-sequence enforcement, intent guards that block malicious or accidental harmful requests, and human-in-the-loop tool approval checkpoints for potentially destructive actions. The artifact illustrates how typed governance primitives enable faster, safer deployment of enterprise agentic systems while improving policy adherence and execution consistency.

</details>


### [448] [For How Long Should We Be Punching? Learning Action Duration in Fighting Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20911)
*Hoang Hai Nguyen,Kurt Driessens,Dennis J. N. J. Soemers*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在格斗游戏（如《街头霸王II》）中让强化学习智能体自主学习动作及其持续时间的新框架，以替代传统固定帧间隔决策方式；实验表明该方法能匹配最优固定帧跳策略的性能并产生可重复动作模式，但单独使用无法保证鲁棒性，且高帧跳（低响应性）反而更易习得针对脚本AI的重复性压制策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RL在格斗游戏中采用固定帧间隔决策，导致要么反应过快（帧级操作不拟人），要么响应迟钝（高帧跳降低计算开销但牺牲灵活性）；需一种能动态调节动作时机与持续时间的更拟人、更灵活的决策机制。

Method: 设计联合预测动作类型与执行时长的决策框架，在FightLadder开源环境中训练智能体对抗脚本BOT，并系统评估不同帧跳配置对性能、响应性及行为模式的影响。

Result: 学习到的动态时序策略能达到与最优固定帧跳相当的性能，倾向于生成可重复的动作序列；但鲁棒性不足；多数情况下，高帧跳（即低响应性）策略表现最佳，因其利于学习对脚本BOT有效的重复性压制动作。

Conclusion: 动态学习动作时长是一种可行的替代方案，能在性能上媲美人工调优的固定帧跳，但其有效性依赖于对手特性；单纯提升时序灵活性不足以增强鲁棒性，需结合其他机制（如对手建模或多样化训练）来提升泛化能力。

Abstract: Fighting games such as Street Fighter II present unique challenges to reinforcement learning (RL) agents due to their fast-paced, real-time nature. In most RL frameworks, agents are hard-coded to make decisions at a fixed interval, typically every frame or every N frames. Although this design ensures timely responses, it restricts the agent's ability to adjust its reaction timing. Acting every frame grants frame-perfect reflexes, which are unrealistic compared to human players, whereas longer fixed intervals reduce computational cost but hinder responsiveness. We consider an alternative decision-making framework in which the agent learns not only what action to take but also for how long to execute it. By jointly predicting both action and duration, the agent can dynamically adapt its responsiveness to different situations in the game. We implement this method using the open-source FightLadder environment with agents trained against scripted built-in bots, systematically testing different frame skip configurations to analyze their influence on performance, responsiveness, and learned behavior. Experiments show that learned timing can match the performance of well-chosen fixed frame skips and encourages repeatable action patterns, but does not ensure robustness on its own. In most cases, we see agents performing best with consistently high frame skip values (i.e., low responsiveness). This strategy makes it easier to learn exploitative strategies where the same action is repeated over and over, which the scripted bots appear to be susceptible to.

</details>


### [449] [Playing Devil's Advocate: Off-the-Shelf Persona Vectors Rival Targeted Steering for Sycophancy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21006)
*Ishaan Kelkar,Nebras Alam,Vikram Kakaria,Madhur Panwar,Vasu Sharma,Maheep Chaudhary*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究不同人格对模型谄媚性（sycophancy）的影响，发现基于怀疑或审慎人格的现成引导向量可有效抑制谄媚性，效果接近对比激活增强法（CAA），且不损害正确回答的准确性；谄媚性更应被理解为一种人格层面属性，而非单一可 steering 的方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究是否可用现成、未针对谄媚性训练的人格引导向量替代需标注数据的 Contrastive Activation Addition（CAA）方法，以更简洁、鲁棒地缓解大模型的谄媚倾向。

Method: 在两个指令微调模型上，使用离线获取的、源自通用角色扮演任务的人格 steering 向量（如‘怀疑型’‘审慎型’‘讨好型’），评估其对 sycophancy 的调控效果，并与 CAA 对比；分析其对准确率的影响及在激活空间中的几何关系。

Result: ‘怀疑型’和‘审慎型’人格引导使 sycophancy 分别降至 CAA 效果的 68% 和 98%，且保持用户正确时的回答准确率；而‘讨好型’人格未显著提升 sycophancy；人格向量与 sycophancy 方向在激活空间中基本正交。

Conclusion: sycophancy 是一种人格层面的系统性倾向，而非单一可线性 steering 的偏差方向；现成 persona 向量可作为轻量、泛化性更强的干预手段，挑战了将该问题简化为方向校准的主流范式。

Abstract: We study the effect of different persona on \textbf{sycophancy}: model's agreement with users even when the user is incorrect. The standard mitigation, Contrastive Activation Addition (CAA), derives a steering direction from labelled pairs of sycophantic and honest responses. This study evaluates whether off-the-shelf persona steering vectors, originally developed for general role-playing and not trained on sycophancy data, can serve as an alternative. In two instruction-tuned models, steering toward personas characterised by doubt or scrutiny reduces sycophancy to approximately $68\%$ and $98\%$ of CAA's effect, and, unlike CAA, maintains accuracy when the user is correct. The effect is also asymmetric: steering toward agreeable personas does not produce a mirror increase in sycophancy. Geometrically, the persona vector is largely independent of the direction of sycophancy in activation space. Collectively, these findings suggest that sycophancy is better understood as a persona-level property rather than a single steerable direction. We release our code here: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Sycophancy-Steering-9DF0/.

</details>


### [450] [AutoRPA: Efficient GUI Automation through LLM-Driven Code Synthesis from Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21082)
*Minghao Chen,Xinyi Hu,Zhou Yu,Yufei Yin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AutoRPA框架，将基于ReAct范式的LLM GUI代理决策逻辑自动提炼为高效、可复用的RPA函数，在保持任务性能的同时大幅降低token消耗（82%-96%）和提升运行效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM GUI代理（如ReAct）在重复性GUI任务中推理开销大、效率低；而传统RPA虽高效但开发维护成本高。亟需融合二者优势的自动化方案。

Method: 提出AutoRPA框架：（1）翻译-构建流水线——翻译代理将硬编码ReAct动作转为软编码过程，构建代理通过多轨迹检索增强生成鲁棒RPA函数；（2）混合修复策略——在代码验证阶段结合RPA执行与ReAct回退机制进行迭代优化。

Result: 在多个GUI环境中实验表明，AutoRPA生成的RPA函数能成功解决相似任务，token用量减少82%–96%，显著提升运行效率与可复用性。

Conclusion: AutoRPA有效弥合了LLM智能性与RPA高效性之间的鸿沟，为重复性GUI自动化任务提供了轻量、可靠、可扩展的新范式。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) based agents have demonstrated proficiency in multi-step interactions with graphical user interfaces (GUIs). While most research focuses on improving single-task performance, practical scenarios often involve repetitive GUI tasks for which invoking LLM reasoning repeatedly, i.e., the ReAct paradigm, is inefficient. Prior to LLMs, traditional Robotic Process Automation (RPA) offers runtime efficiency but demands significant manual effort to develop and maintain. To bridge this gap, we propose AutoRPA, a framework that automatically distills the decision logic of ReAct-style agents into robust RPA functions. AutoRPA introduces two core innovations: (1) A translator-builder pipeline, where a translator agent converts hard-coded ReAct actions into soft-coded procedures, and a builder agent synthesizes robust RPA functions via retrieval-augmented generation over multiple trajectories; (2) A hybrid repair strategy during code verification, combining RPA execution with ReAct-based fallback for iterative refinement. Experiments across multiple GUI environments demonstrate that RPA functions generated by AutoRPA successfully solve similar tasks while reducing token usage by 82% to 96%, significantly improving runtime efficiency and reusability.

</details>


### [451] [ScenePilot: Controllable Boundary-Driven Critical Scenario Generation for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21168)
*Qiyu Ruan,Yuxuan Wang,He Li,Zhenning Li,Cheng-zhong Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出ScenePilot框架，通过结合物理可行性与风险预测的约束多目标强化学习，在仿真中生成处于‘可解但易失败’边界带的安全关键驾驶场景，显著提升碰撞率同时保持物理有效性，并验证其对下游系统鲁棒性提升的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然驾驶数据中安全关键场景稀少，需依赖仿真压力测试；现有对抗式场景生成方法或忽略车辆-道路物理限制导致不真实失败，或单独强调物理/策略可行性而偏离真实挑战边界。

Method: 提出ScenePilot：基于RSS的物理可行性得分σ与在线学习的AV风险预测器Φ联合建模，构建约束多目标强化学习框架；引入步级可行性感知屏蔽机制，引导探索紧贴可行性边界。

Result: 在SafeBench上实验表明，相比基线方法，ScenePilot提升碰撞率6.2个百分点且保持物理有效性；基于其生成场景进行对抗微调，可一致降低下游实际撞车率。

Conclusion: ScenePilot能高效生成位于‘物理可解但系统易失败’边界带的高质量压力测试场景，为自动驾驶系统鲁棒性评估与提升提供了新范式。

Abstract: Safety-critical scenarios are central to evaluating autonomous driving systems, yet their rarity in naturalistic logs makes simulation-based stress testing indispensable. Most scenario generation methods treat surrounding agents as adversaries, but they either (i) induce failures without explicitly modeling vehicle-road physical limits, yielding visually extreme yet physically unsolvable crashes, or (ii) enforce physical feasibility or policy feasibility in isolation, which can over-focus on aggressive maneuvers or remain tied to a controller-dependent capability boundary. We propose ScenePilot, a feasibility-guided, boundary-driven framework that targets the boundary band: scenarios that are physically solvable in principle yet still cause the deployed autonomy stack to fail. We formulate generation as constrained multi-objective reinforcement learning, combining an RSS-derived physical-feasibility score $σ$ with an online-learned AV-risk predictor $Φ$, and introduce step-level feasibility-aware shielding to keep exploration near the feasibility boundary while avoiding infeasible artifacts. Experiments on SafeBench with multiple planners show that ScenePilot yields substantially higher collision rates (+6.2 percentage points) while preserving physical validity, and that adversarial fine-tuning on these boundary-band scenarios consistently reduces downstream crash rates. The code is available at https://github.com/QiyuRuan/ScenePilot.

</details>


### [452] [Insights Generator: Systematic Corpus-Level Trace Diagnostics for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21347)
*Akshay Manglik,Apaar Shanker,Kaustubh Deshpande,Jason Qin,Yash Maurya,Veronica Chatrath,Vijay S. Kalmath,Levi Lentz,Yuan,Xue*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Insights Generator（IG）的多智能体系统，用于在大规模LLM执行轨迹语料库中自动诊断系统性行为模式，并生成有证据支持的自然语言洞察报告。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM智能体故障诊断主要依赖人工检查少量执行轨迹，难以发现跨轨迹的系统性模式，且无法扩展到生产级大规模、长上下文轨迹语料库。

Method: 形式化定义了语料库级轨迹诊断问题，并设计了基于scout-investigator架构的多智能体系统IG：scout负责提出假设，investigator在轨迹语料库中检验假设并收集证据，最终生成结构化、可验证的自然语言洞察报告。

Result: IG在人工评估中报告深度与证据质量优于竞品；使用IG报告改进scaffold后性能提升30.4个百分点；编码智能体采纳IG洞察后表现更稳定；检测覆盖度与现有方法相当。

Conclusion: IG为LLM智能体诊断提供了可扩展、可解释、证据驱动的新范式，显著提升了人工与自动化修复效率。

Abstract: Diagnosing failures in LLM agents remains largely manual. Practitioners inspect a small subset of execution traces, form ad-hoc hypotheses, and iterate. This process misses patterns that only emerge across trace populations and does not scale to production corpora where individual traces span tens of thousands of tokens. We formalize the problem of corpus-level trace diagnostics. Given a corpus of execution traces, the goal is to produce grounded natural-language insights that characterize systematic behavioral patterns across trace groups, each linked to supporting evidence. We present the Insights Generator (IG), a multi-agent system that answers diagnostic questions by proposing and testing hypotheses across the trace corpus to produce an evidence-backed insights report. We evaluate IG across qualitative and objective dimensions, spanning rubric-based report assessment and downstream performance improvements achieved by implementing IG insights. Human experts using IG reports improve scaffold performance by 30.4pp over the unmodified baseline scaffold, and coding agents leveraging IG-derived insights show consistent and stable gains. Across benchmarks, IG's scout-investigator architecture produces findings comparable in detection coverage to competing approaches, while domain experts rated IG reports as leading depth and evidence quality.

</details>


### [453] [Towards Resilient and Autonomous Networks: A BlueSky Vision on AI-Native 6G](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21395)
*Liang Wu,Kelly Wan,Mayank Darbari,Liangjie Hong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出6G网络中人工智能原生集成的BlueSky愿景，强调从'网络为AI服务'转向'AI为网络服务'，通过构建6G基础模型和多智能体系统，实现网络的自主诊断、维护与恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 新兴应用（如自动驾驶和沉浸式体验）对蜂窝网络提出了更高要求：不仅更快，还需更鲁棒、更自主；5G中分散、单任务AI模型已无法满足未来需求。

Method: 提出以基础模型为锚点、多智能体系统协同编排的AI原生架构，将网络管理建模为统一的多模态、多任务优化问题，并规划两大技术方向：6G基础模型构建与知识蒸馏、面向自治的多智能体网络运维系统。

Result: 明确了6G中AI原生集成的总体架构与两条关键技术路径，为构建智能、自维持的通信基础设施提供前瞻性路线图。

Conclusion: 6G应以原生AI为核心，通过基础模型与多智能体系统实现网络的深度自治，从而根本性提升韧性与智能化水平。

Abstract: The proliferation of emerging applications, such as autonomous driving and immersive experiences, demands cellular networks that are not only faster, but fundamentally more resilient and autonomous. This paper presents a BlueSky vision on how Artificial Intelligence will be natively integrated into 6G, shifting the paradigm from \underline{Network for AI} to \underline{AI for Network}. We envision that, unlike 5G's reliance on scattered, ad-hoc models each trained for a single task, native AI in the 6G era will be anchored by a foundation model and and orchestrated via collaborative multi-agent systems, framing network management as a unified, multi-modal, multi-task optimization problem. Built on this vision, we outline two transformative directions. The first focuses on developing a 6G foundation model as a unified backbone, with task-specific knowledge distilled into compact models suited for diverse edge deployments. The second advances multi-agent systems designed to autonomously diagnose, maintain, and recover networks with minimal human intervention. These directions chart a roadmap for 6G to evolve into an intelligent, self-sustaining communication infrastructure.

</details>


### [454] [Teaching AI Through Benchmark Construction: QuestBench as a Course-Based Practice for Accountable Knowledge Work](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21413)
*Haiyang Shen,Jiuzheng Wang,Taian Guo,Mugeng Liu,Wenchun Jing,Chongyang Pan,Siqi Zhong,Zhiyang Chen,Weichen Bi,Yudong Han,Xiaoying Bai,Yun Ma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种通过构建基准测试（QuestBench）来教授学生批判性评估AI系统的新教学法，强调学生在AI时代作为知识判断者的主体性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI教育多聚焦于将AI作为生产力工具使用，缺乏培养学生检验AI、判断机器生成知识可靠性的能力；需拓展AI教育内涵，使其包含对AI局限性的理解与专业判断力的培养。

Method: 设计并实施一门以‘基准构建’为核心的课程实践：学生基于人文学科与社会科学知识设计可验证的专家级问题，相互审查问题质量，并用这些问题评测深度研究型AI系统；最终形成含256个问题的QuestBench基准。

Result: 在QuestBench上评测13种深度研究系统，平均通过率仅16.85%，最优系统GPT-5.5为57.58%；失败案例揭示AI虽能生成流畅且有来源支持的答案，却常错失关键查询意图、原始文献、术语或证据标准；5名学生反思表明该实践有效提升其对专业知识作为判断依据的认知。

Conclusion: 基准构建是一种兼具教育价值与实践意义的教学范式，不仅产出可复用的评估资源（QuestBench），更帮助学生确立在AI介入学习与专业工作中的责任主体地位。

Abstract: As AI becomes part of everyday learning, many courses teach students to use it mainly as a productivity tool: how to prompt, search, summarize, write, code, and use tools more efficiently. We argue that AI education also needs a setting in which students learn to test AI and understand their own role in judging machine-produced knowledge. To this end, we introduce a course-based practice that teaches AI through benchmark construction, using deep research systems as a concrete example of AI-era knowledge work. Students turn disciplinary knowledge into verifiable expert-level questions, review one another's designs for ambiguity and shortcuts, and evaluate AI systems on the resulting tasks. This activity gives students direct exposure to a powerful tool while asking them to specify what a trustworthy answer would require. The produced benchmark, QuestBench, consists of 256 questions across 14 humanities and social-science domains. Evaluation on QuestBench shows that student-designed tasks reveal hidden failures in current deep research systems: across thirteen evaluated systems, the mean question-level pass rate is only 16.85%, and the best-performing system, GPT-5.5, reaches a 57.58% pass rate. The failures are educationally useful because they show how fluent, source-backed answers can still miss the right query, source, term, or evidence standard. Reflections from five student contributors suggest that benchmark construction can help students see professional knowledge not only as content AI may retrieve, but as the basis for judging AI outputs. We present QuestBench as a benchmark artifact and as a reusable classroom setting for a larger educational question: how students can remain responsible knowledge actors as AI enters learning and professional work. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/PKUAIWeb/QuestBench/tree/main.

</details>


### [455] [PALS: Power-Aware LLM Serving for Mixture-of-Experts Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21427)
*Can Hankendi,Rana Shahout,Minlan Yu,Ayse K. Coskun*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PALS，一种面向大语言模型（LLM）推理服务的功耗感知运行时系统，将GPU功耗上限作为可调控的一等参数，联合优化功耗限制与批处理大小等软件配置，在不修改模型或API的前提下显著提升能效并保障服务质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM推理系统将GPU功耗视为静态约束，未将其作为可主动调控的优化维度；而数据中心中LLM推理能耗高、功耗波动大，亟需能效与QoS协同优化的动态功耗管理方法。

Method: 提出PALS运行时系统，融合轻量级离线功耗-性能建模与反馈驱动控制器，联合优化GPU功率上限和批大小等参数；集成于vLLM框架，无需重训练或API变更。

Result: 在多GPU及稠密/MoE模型上，PALS提升能效最高达26.3%，在功耗约束下将QoS违规降低4–7倍，并能动态跟踪变化的功率预算。

Conclusion: 将功耗控制深度集成至LLM推理运行时是可行且高效的，为构建能耗正比化与电网交互式AI系统提供了新路径。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) inference has become a dominant workload in modern data centers, driving significant GPU utilization and energy consumption. While prior systems optimize throughput and latency by batching, scheduling, and parallelism, they largely treat GPU power as a static constraint rather than a controllable resource. In this paper, we present a power-aware runtime for LLM serving, PALS, that treats GPU power caps as a first-class control knob and jointly optimizes them with software parameters such as batch size. The system combines lightweight offline power-performance models with a feedback-driven controller to select configurations that satisfy throughput targets while maximizing energy efficiency. We implement PALS within an existing LLM serving framework, vLLM, demonstrating that it requires no model retraining or API changes. Across multi-GPU systems and both dense and mixture-of-experts (MoE) models, PALS improves energy efficiency by up to 26.3%, reduces QoS violations by 4x to 7x under power constraints, and tracks dynamic power budgets. These results highlight the potential of integrating power control directly into LLM inference runtimes, enabling energy-proportional and grid-interactive AI systems.

</details>


### [456] [Mind the Sim-to-Real Gap & Think Like a Scientist](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21458)
*Harsh Parikh,Gabriel Levin-Konigsberg,Dominique Perrault-Joncas,Alexander Volfovsky*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了在拥有预训练模拟器和有限真实实验资源的情况下，如何最优地结合两者进行顺序决策。作者提出了三个核心结果：扩展的模拟引理分解了模拟器误差；分析了模拟器最优策略与真实最优策略之间的价值差距；并设计了Fisher-SEP算法以最小化目标策略价值的后验预测方差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation:  planner拥有廉价但存在偏差的预训练模拟器和昂贵但无偏的真实实验能力，需决定何时及如何混合使用二者以优化长期决策性能。

Method: 通过扩展模拟引理分解误差来源，区分局部价值差距与可达性差距，并提出Fisher-SEP算法——一种基于后验预测方差最小化的仿真辅助实验策略，包含仅奖励和仅转移两种特化形式。

Result: 1）模拟器价值误差可分解为可识别的校准-部署偏移与不可减小的参数残差；2）纯被动学习无法消除可达性相关价值差距；3）Fisher-SEP在两个案例中展现出优于纯模拟或纯实验的性能：供应链示例中前期集中实验更优，HIV检测示例中仅主动设计探索能覆盖低监测区域。

Conclusion: 单纯依赖模拟器或真实实验均存在根本局限；应根据问题结构（如可达性瓶颈、校准漂移程度、决策周期长度）自适应地混合使用二者，Fisher-SEP提供了一种基于统计效率的实用设计原则。

Abstract: Suppose a planner has a pre-trained simulator of a sequential decision problem and the option to run real experiments in the field. The simulator is cheap to query but inherits confounding and drift from its calibration data. Experimentation is unbiased but consumes one real unit per trial. We study when, and how, the planner should supplement the simulator with experiments. We give three results. First, an extended simulation lemma decomposes the simulator's value error into a calibration--deployment shift that randomization can identify and a parametric residual that no further interaction can reduce. Second, the value gap between the simulator-optimal policy and the optimum splits into a local component, on states the deployed policy already visits, and a reachability component, on states it does not. The reachability component stays bounded away from zero at any horizon under purely passive learning. Third, we propose Fisher-SEP, a simulation-aided experimental policy (SEP) that minimizes the posterior predictive variance of a target policy's value, with reward-only and transition-only specializations. Two case studies illustrate the regimes. In a vending-machine supply chain, front-loaded experimentation overtakes posterior updating once the horizon is long enough to amortize the pilot. In an HIV mobile-testing example with a corridor that separates a well-surveilled region from a poorly-surveilled one, only designed exploration reaches the poorly-surveilled region.

</details>


### [457] [AiraXiv: An AI-Driven Open-Access Platform for Human and AI Scientists](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21481)
*Junshu Pan,Panzhong Lu,Yixuan Weng,Qiyao Sun,Fang Guo,Zijie Yang,Qiji Zhou,Yue Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AiraXiv——一个面向AI时代的开放、可扩展学术出版平台，融合人类与AI科学家协作、预印本开放共享、AI增强分析与评审、持续迭代反馈机制，并已在ICAI 2025等真实场景中验证其可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统以会议和期刊为中心的出版范式面临投稿量激增、审稿负担加重、规模难以扩展等挑战，亟需适配AI时代人机协同科研新生态的出版基础设施。

Method: 设计并实现AiraXiv平台，基于开放预印本，集成AI增强分析与评审、Model Context Protocol（MCP）支持AI科学家交互、人机双模接口（交互式UI + MCP），并支持持续反馈驱动的论文演化。

Result: AiraXiv已在ICAI 2025等真实学术活动中部署为官方投稿平台，验证了其在速度、包容性与可扩展性方面的有效性；平台已开源并上线运行（https://airaxiv.com）。

Conclusion: AiraXiv代表了一种面向AI时代的人机共治、持续演化的新型学术出版范式，有望成为支撑未来科研基础设施的关键载体。

Abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) have accelerated the growth of both human-authored and AI-generated research outputs, placing increasing strain on traditional academic publishing systems and challenging the scalability of conference- and journal-centered paradigms amid rising submission volumes, reviewer workload, and venue size. To address these challenges, we explore an AI-era publishing paradigm in which both human and AI scientists participate as authors and readers, and papers evolve through continuous, feedback-driven iteration. We propose AiraXiv, an AI-driven open-access platform built on open preprints, AI-augmented analysis and review, and reader feedback. AiraXiv supports human scientists through an interactive UI and AI scientists through Model Context Protocol (MCP)-based interactions. We validate AiraXiv through real-world deployments, including serving as the submission platform for ICAIS 2025, demonstrating its potential as a fast, inclusive, and scalable research infrastructure for the AI era. AiraXiv is publicly available at https://airaxiv.com.

</details>


### [458] [DeepWeb-Bench: A Deep Research Benchmark Demanding Massive Cross-Source Evidence and Long-Horizon Derivation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21482)
*Sixiong Xie,Zhuofan Shi,Haiyang Shen,Jiuzheng Wang,Siqi Zhong,Mugeng Liu,Chongyang Pan,Peilun Jia,Baoqing Sun,Xiang Jing,Yun Ma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个名为DeepWeb-Bench的深度研究基准，旨在更严格地评估前沿语言模型在大规模证据收集、跨源信息整合与长程多步推理方面的能力。实验发现检索并非瓶颈，而推导与校准错误占主导；强弱模型失败模式不同；模型在不同领域存在真实的专业化差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准难以区分当前前沿语言模型在深度研究任务中的真实能力，因此需要更具挑战性的新基准。

Method: 构建DeepWeb-Bench基准，强调三大难度特性：大规模证据收集、跨源信息协调、长时程多步推导，并将其映射为四大能力族（检索、推导、推理、校准）；引入四层溯源记录与交叉验证机制以增强可审计性；在九个前沿模型上进行系统评测。

Result: （1）检索失败仅占12–14%错误，推导与校准失败超70%；（2）强模型错误主因是推导不完整，弱模型主因是幻觉式精确；（3）模型跨领域表现差异显著，跨模型一致性仅ρ=0.61，单案例分歧高达18.8个百分点。

Conclusion: DeepWeb-Bench揭示了当前语言模型在深度研究中真正的能力瓶颈与行为差异，为未来模型开发与评估提供了更精细、可验证的方向。

Abstract: Deep research, in which an agent searches the open web, collects evidence, and derives an answer through extended reasoning, is a prominent use case for frontier language models. Frontier deep research products score high on existing benchmarks, making it difficult to distinguish their capabilities from current evaluation data alone. We introduce DeepWeb-Bench, a deep research benchmark that is substantially harder than existing benchmarks for the current frontier. Difficulty comes from three properties of the data itself: each task requires massive evidence collection, cross-source reconciliation, and long-horizon multi-step derivation. We represent these three sources of difficulty as four capability families (Retrieval, Derivation, Reasoning, and Calibration) and report results sliced by family. Every reference answer is accompanied by a source-provenance record with four disclosure levels and cross-source checks where available, making scores easier to audit against the underlying evidence. We evaluate DeepWeb-Bench on nine frontier models and report three findings: (1) retrieval is not the bottleneck, as retrieval failures account for only 12-14% of errors while derivation and calibration failures account for over 70%; (2) strong and weak models fail in qualitatively different ways, with strong models' errors dominated by incomplete derivation and weak models' by hallucinated precision; and (3) models exhibit genuine specialization across domains, with cross-model agreement of only rho = 0.61 and per-case disagreement reaching 18.8 percentage points. The public benchmark release includes the data, rubrics, and evaluation code.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [459] [What Do Agents Communicate? Characterizing Information Exchange in Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20548)
*Yong Jin Chun,Iftekhar Ahmed*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出Category-Aware Recovery Augmentation（CARA）技术，通过在多智能体通信中强制注入关键推理与验证信息，显著缓解错误传播问题，恢复86.2%的失败案例，强调信息质量对多智能体协作的关键作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型驱动的多智能体系统易受错误传播影响，早期信息退化会损害下游推理；需系统分析通信内容以识别驱动性能的关键信息。

Method: 系统分析多智能体间通信，发现缺乏推理与验证信息是性能下降主因；据此提出Category-Aware Recovery Augmentation（CARA），在通信中显式增强关键信息。

Result: CARA方法成功恢复86.2%的失败案例，验证了提升通信中推理与验证信息可显著改善多智能体协同效果。

Conclusion: 多智能体协作效能高度依赖通信中的信息质量，尤其推理与验证内容不可或缺；CARA为提升鲁棒性提供了有效且可解释的通信增强范式。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled collaborative Multi-Agent (MA) systems, where interacting agents improve performance through diverse reasoning and iterative refinement. However, these systems remain vulnerable to error propagation, where early-stage information degrades downstream reasoning. To address this, we conduct a systematic analysis of inter-agent communication to identify which information drives MA performance. We find that the absence of reasoning and verification in inter-agent communication significantly degrades performance. Based on these insights, we propose Category-Aware Recovery Augmentation (technique), which enforces the presence of critical information during communication. recovers up to 86.2% of failed cases. Our results highlight the key role of information quality in effective MA collaboration. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/cara_mas

</details>


### [460] [Multi-agent Collaboration with State Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20563)
*Mengyang Liu,Taozhi Chen,Zhenhua Xu,Xue Jiang,Yihong Dong*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出STORM（State-Oriented Management），一种面向状态的多智能体协同管理框架，通过实时中介智能体对共享代码库的写操作，确保一致视图并即时检测/解决冲突，避免传统基于git工作树隔离导致的后期昂贵合并；在Commit0和PaperBench上显著超越基线，且兼容性强。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体并发编辑共享代码库时易产生静默冲突和视图不一致，导致集成失败；现有基于工作区隔离（如每智能体一个git worktree）的方法将冲突解决推迟到后期合并，恢复成本高。

Method: 提出STORM框架，通过状态导向的中介机制管理各智能体与共享工作区的交互，确保每个智能体始终基于一致代码视图执行操作，并在写入时即时检测和解析冲突。

Result: 在Commit0-Lite上比git-worktree基线提升+18.7，在PaperBench上提升+1.4；结合单智能体运行达最高分87.6和78.2；成本效率相当或更优；支持无缝接入任意多智能体系统。

Conclusion: 显式的状态管理比工作区隔离更适合作为多智能体协作的基础范式，STORM验证了其有效性、高效性与通用性。

Abstract: Recent advances in multi-agent systems have shown great potential for solving complex tasks. However, when multiple agents edit a shared codebase concurrently, their changes can silently conflict and inconsistent views lead to integration failures. Existing multi-agent systems address this through workspace isolation (e.g., one git worktree per agent), but this defers conflict resolution to a post-hoc merge step where recovery is expensive. In this paper, we propose STORM, i.e., STate-ORiented Management for multi-agent collaboration. Specifically, STORM manages agent states by mediating their interactions with the shared workspace, ensuring that each agent operates on a consistent view of the codebase and that conflicting edits are detected and resolved at write time. We evaluate STORM on Commit0 and PaperBench across multiple LLMs. STORM outperforms the git-worktree-based multi-agent baseline by +18.7 on Commit0-Lite and +1.4 on PaperBench, while achieving comparable or better cost efficiency. Combined with single-agent runs, STORM reaches highest scores of 87.6 and 78.2 on the two benchmarks respectively, suggesting that explicit state management is a more effective foundation for multi-agent collaboration than workspace isolation. STORM can also be plugged into any multi-agent system seamlessly.

</details>


### [461] [ProCrit: Self-Elicited Multi-Perspective Reasoning with Critic-Guided Revision for Multimodal Sarcasm Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20867)
*Yingjia Xu,Jiulong Wu,Bowen Zhang,Baokui Guo,Siyuan Chai,Min Cao*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出ProCrit框架，通过提案-批评双智能体机制实现自激发的多视角推理，用于多模态讽刺检测。该框架利用动态角色代理 rollout生成过程级推理标注，并采用草稿-批评-修订范式提升推理可靠性，结合双阶段强化学习进行联合优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖固定预定义分析视角和手工设计的路由规则，无法适应讽刺机制的样本多样性；且缺乏过程级监督信号，限制了模型对跨模态不一致性的深度推理能力。

Method: 提出ProCrit双智能体框架：1）提案智能体生成适配样本的多视角推理；2）批评智能体进行外部评估并提供自然语言反馈以指导修订；3）通过动态角色代理rollout合成过程级推理标注；4）采用草稿-批评-修订范式；5）设计双向精炼训练框架，用双阶段强化学习联合优化提案与修订，并根据反馈实际效果反向优化批评智能体。

Result: 在三个主流多模态讽刺检测基准上验证了ProCrit的有效性，显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 自激发的多视角推理是解决多模态讽刺检测中跨模态不一致性建模的关键；ProCrit通过可解释、可迭代、可优化的双智能体协同机制，为复杂语义理解任务提供了新范式。

Abstract: Multimodal sarcasm detection requires reasoning over cross-modal incongruities between literal expression and intended meaning, yet the specific analytical perspectives needed vary across samples due to the diversity of sarcastic mechanisms. While recent methods make this analytical process explicit, they still rely on fixed, predefined perspectives that operate independently under hand-crafted routing rules. We argue that multimodal sarcasm detection instead calls for self-elicited multi-perspective reasoning, where a model autonomously generates the perspectives needed for each sample and progressively integrates them into a coherent analysis. To realize this goal, we propose ProCrit, a Proposal-Critic two-agent framework with a proposal agent for multi-perspective reasoning and a critic agent for external evaluation and targeted revision guidance. First, to overcome the lack of process-level supervision in existing sarcasm datasets, ProCrit synthesizes process-level reasoning annotations through a dynamic-role agentic rollout: a strong vision-language model sequentially spawns analytical roles within a shared context, and the resulting multi-role trajectories are flattened into sequences that preserve cross-perspective dependencies while enabling efficient autoregressive generation. Second, to improve reasoning reliability, ProCrit adopts a draft-critique-revise paradigm in which an independent critic identifies reasoning deficiencies and provides targeted natural-language feedback for directed revision. Finally, we develop a mutual-refinement training framework that jointly optimizes proposal drafting and feedback-guided revision via dual-stage reinforcement learning, while refining the critic agent according to the actual effectiveness of its feedback. Experiments on three widely used benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of ProCrit.

</details>


### [462] [Decoupling Communication from Policy: Robust MARL under Bandwidth Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21085)
*Alexi Canesse,Benoît Goupil,Jesse Read,Sonia Vanier*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在带宽受限的多智能体强化学习（MARL）中解耦通信与策略表示的新方法SLIM，并引入标准化带宽预算β，实现了高效、鲁棒且可扩展的通信。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实应用（如无人机搜救）中通信带宽严重受限，而现有通信架构将策略执行与通信共享同一潜在表示，导致压缩通信会直接削弱策略能力。

Method: 提出标准化带宽预算β来统一衡量稀疏性、通信轮次和消息维度；设计SLIM架构，将通信通路与策略潜在表示完全解耦，支持每步通信且不牺牲策略容量。

Result: 在多个需通信的不完全可观测MARL基准上达到SOTA性能；在带宽受限下展现出强可扩展性与鲁棒性，带宽降低时性能仅轻微下降。

Conclusion: 解耦通信与策略表示是提升带宽受限MARL性能的关键，SLIM为低带宽多智能体协同提供了实用且理论清晰的架构范式。

Abstract: Communication enables coordination in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), but many real-world applications, e.g., search-and-rescue with drone swarms, operate under severe bandwidth constraints. Many communication architectures still expose a coupled bottleneck in which a shared latent representation is used for both policy execution and inter-agent communication. Consequently, reducing message size directly limits the policy's latent space, often leading to significant performance degradation. We address this with two contributions. First, we introduce $β$, a normalised per-agent bandwidth budget that unifies sparsity, rounds, and message dimension into a single comparable constraint. Second, we provide SLIM, a minimal architecture that decouples the communication pathway from the policy's latent representation, allowing us to isolate the effect of bandwidth from the effect of policy capacity while benefiting from in-step communication. We evaluate our method on several partially-observable MARL benchmarks, where communication is essential. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance and exhibits scalability and robustness under limited communication, with only marginal degradation as bandwidth is reduced.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [463] [Adaptive Human-Robot Collaboration for Masonry Construction Under Material and Assembly Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20264)
*Jutang Gao,Arash Adel*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自适应人机协同砌筑施工工作流，通过末端投影引导人工涂胶和激光扫描反馈校正机器人抓取与定位，有效应对通信限制和累积公差问题，提升了施工精度与鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人机协作施工中存在通信受限及材料与装配不确定性导致的公差累积问题。

Method: 采用末端安装的投影仪提供空间注册的实时投影引导用于人工涂胶，并结合激光扫描实现基于反馈的抓取与放置位姿校正。

Result: 全尺寸实验表明，投影引导提高了涂胶一致性并缩短了时间，激光校正维持了水平砌层并避免了开环执行中的碰撞故障。

Conclusion: 融合空间投影与反馈驱动自适应（依托材料与建成状态感知）可缓解公差累积，提升人机协同施工的精度与鲁棒性。

Abstract: Human-robot collaboration in construction is often challenged by limited robot-to-human communication and the need to adapt to tolerance accumulation arising from material and assembly uncertainties. We present an adaptive human-robot collaborative workflow for masonry construction that addresses communication limitations and tolerance accumulation, demonstrated through a brickwork case study in which a robot places bricks while a human applies adhesive. This workflow is enabled by two complementary mechanisms: 1) an end-effector-mounted projector that provides spatially registered, just-in-time projection guidance for manual adhesive application, and 2) laser scanning for feedback-driven grasping and placement pose correction. Together, these mechanisms enable adjustment of human and robotic actions in response to material variability and accumulated assembly tolerances. Full-scale experiments across conventional running-bond and nonstandard configurations demonstrate that projection guidance improves adhesive application consistency and reduces application time, while laser-based correction maintains level courses and avoids collision-prone failures associated with open-loop execution. These results indicate that integrating spatial projection with feedback-driven adaptation, enabled by material and as-built sensing, can mitigate tolerance accumulation and improve precision and robustness in human-robot collaborative construction.

</details>


### [464] [Terrestrial Soft Mobile Robots: A Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20304)
*Dimuthu D. K. Arachchige*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文综述了无轮陆地软体移动机器人的研究现状，涵盖运动策略、驱动方法、建模与控制，并指出关键挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软体移动机器人在搜救、服务、监控、探索和制造等领域具有广阔应用前景，但其研究仍面临诸多挑战，需系统性梳理与总结。

Method: 采用文献综述方法，系统梳理轮式以外的软体陆地移动机器人在运动策略、驱动方式、建模方法及控制系统等方面的进展。

Result: 归纳了当前软体移动机器人在无轮陆地运动方面的关键技术进展，并明确了阻碍其实际应用的关键挑战。

Conclusion: 该综述为软体机器人领域研究人员和从业者提供了重要参考，有助于推动该技术向实用化发展。

Abstract: Soft mobile robots have emerged as a promising area of research with potential applications in various disciplines including but not limited to search-and-rescue, service, surveillance, explorations, and manufacturing. In this article, we provide a comprehensive review of the current state of soft mobile robot research, focusing on wheelless terrestrial locomotive systems. We include past and present developments in locomotion strategies, actuation methods, modeling approaches, and control systems. Further, we identify key research challenges that must be overcome to enable the widespread adoption of soft mobile robots in various applications. Overall, this article provides a valuable resource for researchers and practitioners interested in the field of soft mobile robots and soft robotics.

</details>


### [465] [SUGAR: A Scalable Human-Video-Driven Generalizable Humanoid Loco-Manipulation Learning Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20373)
*Tianshu Wu,Xiangqi Kong,Yue Chen,Qize Yu,Hang Ye,Jia Li,Yizhou Wang,Hao Dong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SUGAR是一种无需任务特定奖励设计或参考动作引导的数据驱动框架，能将多样化的人类视频转化为可部署的仿人机器人全身运动-操作技能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖繁琐的奖励工程、僵化的参考动作回放或高成本的遥操作，且从人类视频中提取的动作先验因遮挡、接触伪影和重定向误差而不适合直接用于策略学习。

Method: SUGAR包含三阶段：1）全自动提取人类视频中的运动学交互先验（如人-物轨迹与接触标签）；2）基于物理的特权精炼器利用统一模仿奖励和渐进状态池，将不完美先验转化为物理可行、高保真技能；3）将精炼技能蒸馏为分层自主策略（含指令生成器与跟踪器）。

Result: 在仿真与真实仿人机器人硬件上的六项典型任务中，SUGAR显著优于参考跟踪基线；性能随人类视频数据量增加而提升；实现零样本真实世界迁移，具备可靠闭环执行、自主失败恢复及抗外部扰动的长时程稳定性。

Conclusion: SUGAR为构建具泛化能力的真实世界仿人机器人全身运动-操作能力提供了可扩展、数据高效且无需人工干预的新范式。

Abstract: Building humanoid robots capable of generalizable whole-body loco-manipulation in the real world remains a fundamental challenge. Existing methods either rely on laborious task-specific reward engineering, rigidly replay reference motions that fail to generalize, or depend on costly teleoperation that limits scalability. While human videos capture diverse human behaviors, motion priors inferred from them are inherently imperfect, suffering from occlusion, contact artifacts, and retargeting errors that render them unsuitable for direct policy learning. To address this, we present SUGAR, a scalable data-driven framework that converts diverse human videos into deployable humanoid loco-manipulation skills, without any task-specific reward engineering or reference-motion conditioning at inference. SUGAR proceeds in three stages. First, a fully automated pipeline extracts kinematic interaction priors including human-object motion trajectories and contact labels from unstructured human videos. Second, a privileged physics-based refiner uses a unified mimic reward and progressive state pool to transform imperfect priors into physically feasible, high-fidelity skills. Third, refined skills are distilled into a hierarchical autonomous policy consisting of a command generator and a command tracker. We evaluate SUGAR on six representative loco-manipulation tasks in simulation and real-world humanoid hardware. Our method substantially outperforms reference-tracking baselines, and performance scales clearly with the amount of human video data. It also achieves zero-shot real-world transfer with reliable closed-loop execution, autonomous failure recovery, and stable long-horizon performance under external perturbations. Project Page: https://tianshuwu.github.io/sugar-humanoid/

</details>


### [466] [Intent-First Aerial V2V for Tactical Coordination and Separation: Protocol and Performance Under Density and Disturbance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20595)
*Mehrnaz Sabet*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向密集无人机交通管理（UTM）的、控制器耦合的机载V2V战术邻域通信架构，采用意图优先、状态与意图信标结合、事件触发消息机制，并基于C-V2X sidelink实现与验证，证明其可有效支撑中低密度空域下的战术分离，但在高密度/复杂干扰下需向受控降级模式过渡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 密集低空飞行场景中，预规划和碰撞避免不足以应对快速扰动；亟需一种可扩展、实时、可信的机载邻域通信机制来支撑战术级间隔管理。

Method: 提出并实现了首个控制器耦合、全机载、sidelink类、意图优先的V2V战术邻域交换协议栈，融合周期性状态/意图信标与事件触发消息（让道、排序、释放、应急协调），并基于C-V2X模块实现带认证新鲜性检查的原型系统，在真实场站支撑的高负载场景下进行评估。

Result: 实验表明该V2V方案能显著降低陈旧信念偏差、通过协同感知维持可观测性、拒绝无效战术消息、抑制局部误推理、结构化共享资源协调；在中低密度空域表现稳健，但随密度、信道损伤和任务复杂度上升，需转入受控降级模式。

Conclusion: 意图优先的空中V2V是一种有界可行的技术使能手段，可在扰动频发的城市空域中规模化支撑战术协调，为UTM战术层提供可部署的通信基础。

Abstract: Dense low-altitude aerial operations require more than pre-flight route coordination and last-resort collision avoidance. Once aircraft are airborne, disturbances can emerge on timescales shorter than strategic reauthorization can absorb, while collision avoidance is too late and disruptive to serve as routine traffic management. Although tactical separation is recognized as the intermediate layer, realizing it at scale requires a deployable neighborhood communication mechanism that provides fresh, trusted information for local coordination. This paper presents what is, to our knowledge, the first controller-coupled characterization of an all-airborne, sidelink-class, intent-first vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) tactical neighborhood exchange stack for dense Unmanned Aircraft System Traffic Management (UTM) operations. Unlike awareness-only broadcast, the proposed exchange combines refreshed state and intent beacons for local awareness, cooperative perception, and degraded-mode assessment with event-triggered messages for yielding, sequencing, release, and contingency coordination. We implement and evaluate this model on an all-airborne V2V stack using sidelink-class C-V2X modules with authenticated freshness checks. Evaluation uses a scenario-driven, high-volume stress campaign supported by real-time, field-anchored infrastructure. Results show that V2V reduces stale-belief divergence, preserves observability through cooperative perception, rejects invalid tactical messages, suppresses false local inference, and structures shared-resource coordination. The implemented stack provides a viable communication layer for tactical separation in lower-to-moderate regimes, but transitions toward guarded fallback as density, impairment, and complexity increase. These findings position intent-first aerial V2V as a bounded enabler for scaling tactical coordination in disturbance-driven urban airspace.

</details>


### [467] [VBT-MPC: Vision-Based Tactile MPC for Contour Following](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20392)
*Edison Velasco-Sanchez,Luis F. Recalde,Guanrui Li,Pablo Gil*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于视觉触觉的模型预测控制（VBT-MPC）框架，用于机器人在眼在手配置下利用视觉触觉传感器（VBTS）进行轮廓跟踪，直接在轮廓特征空间中运行，无需单独的姿态估计或复杂力控模块。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 触觉传感在机器人操作（如表面检测）中至关重要，需在保持接触的同时精确跟踪物体轮廓，现有方法依赖姿态估计或力控，复杂且泛化性受限。

Method: 提出Vision-Based Tactile Model Predictive Control（VBT-MPC）框架，直接在轮廓特征空间中进行控制；使用眼在手配置的视觉触觉传感器（VBTS）；对比适配于触觉特征的视觉伺服策略。

Result: 在仿真和真实实验中验证了该方法对多种几何形状与材质物体的轮廓跟踪有效性，性能优于适配的视觉伺服策略。

Conclusion: VBT-MPC是一种简洁高效、无需显式姿态估计或力控的触觉轮廓跟踪新范式，提升了鲁棒性与适用性。

Abstract: Tactile sensing plays a key role in robotic manipulation, particularly in tasks like surface inspection. Successful execution requires maintaining contact while accurately tracking object contours. In this work, we propose a Vision-Based Tactile Model Predictive Control (VBT-MPC) framework for robotic contour following using a Vision-Based Tactile Sensor (VBTS) mounted in an eye-in-hand configuration. The proposed controller operates directly in contour features space, thereby avoiding the need for separate pose-estimation modules or complex force-control architectures. We further compare our VBT-MPC with visual-servoing strategies adapted to tactile features, and evaluate contour tracking on objects with diverse geometries and materials in both simulation and real-world experiments.

</details>


### [468] [Scalable Multi-robot Motion Planning via Hierarchical Subproblem Expansion and Workspace Decomposition Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20395)
*Isaac Ngui,Courtney McBeth,James D. Motes,Marco Morales,Nancy M. Amato*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多机器人运动规划方法，通过在工作空间分解上进行离散搜索来实现机器人间协调，避免联合构型空间搜索的高计算开销，规划时间提升达一个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决多机器人运动规划中协调避碰与计算开销之间的矛盾：联合构型空间搜索计算代价大，而缺乏协调易导致冲突。

Method: 基于工作空间分解的离散搜索方法；迭代细化工作空间表示，使规划器能在更小、解耦的构型空间中搜索，而非直接在联合构型空间中搜索。

Result: 规划时间相比传统方法提升最高达一个数量级。

Conclusion: 利用工作空间拓扑结构并迭代细化其表示，可在保证协调性的同时显著降低多机器人运动规划的计算复杂度。

Abstract: A fundamental challenge in multi-robot motion planning is achieving sufficient coordination to avoid inter-robot conflicts without incurring the large computational expense of searching the joint configuration space of the robot group. In this work, we present a method for multiple mobile robot motion planning that achieves an improvement in planning time up to an order of magnitude by leveraging the insight that we can use discrete search over a workspace decomposition to provide coordination between robots during planning. While prior work uses workspace topology to inform when coordination between robots is needed and then composes robots into their joint configuration space, we take a step further by iteratively refining our workspace representation to allow our planner to search smaller, decoupled configuration spaces.

</details>


### [469] [Spacetime Optimal-Transport Attention for Visuo-Haptic Imitation Learning of Contact-Rich Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20433)
*Yue Feng,Weicheng Huang,I-Ming Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Spacetime Optimal-Transport Attention (SO-TA) 的三模态融合注意力机制，用于解决接触密集型机器人操作任务中的多源感知融合难题；结合扩散策略，显著提升了在光照变化、干扰物和部分遮挡等扰动下的鲁棒性与成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 接触密集型操作任务（如紧配合插入、连接器装配等）因涉及不连续接触动力学、部分可观测性和严格安全性约束，对数据驱动控制器构成挑战；单一传感器模态无法满足全阶段需求，而现有多模态融合方法缺乏针对任务特性的结构化先验。

Method: 提出SO-TA：以力-位姿导出的子查询与视觉块之间通过熵正则化最优传输（OT）对齐替代传统softmax注意力，引入显式边缘约束作为结构化归纳偏置；并搭配基于扩散模型的序列策略，将观测窗口映射为位姿-动作块。

Result: 在三个真实机器人任务（紧配合插孔、BCM连接器插入、曲面擦除）中，SO-TA以约200次rollout/条件达成100%成功（对比交叉注意力93%），在扰动下保持82.5%成功率（拼接基线降至43.5%）；提供可解释的OT热图与模态影响比诊断。

Conclusion: SO-TA通过引入最优传输建模三模态注意力，赋予模型对接触阶段敏感的空间选择稳定性与鲁棒性，为接触密集型灵巧操作提供了更可靠、可解释的多模态融合范式。

Abstract: Contact-rich manipulation tasks such as tight-clearance insertion, connector mating, polishing, and surface-conforming wiping remain difficult for data-driven controllers because they couple discontinuous contact dynamics, partial observability, and strict safety constraints. No single sensing modality suffices: vision supplies global context before contact, force/torque (F/T) feedback governs interaction after contact, and proprioceptive pose provides a consistent kinematic backbone. Most prior imitation-learning policies for contact-rich tasks operate on uni- or bi-modal signals, and the few that fuse three modalities typically adopt off-the-shelf attention modules with no explicit prior on how attention mass should be distributed across task-relevant regions. We present Spacetime Optimal-Transport Attention (SO-TA), a tri-modal fusion backbone that replaces softmax-normalized patch attention by an entropy-regularized Optimal Transport (OT) alignment between force-pose-derived sub-queries and visual patches. Explicit marginal constraints act as a structured inductive bias for contact-rich tasks, encouraging conditioning-aware spatial selection that is stable across illumination, distractors, and partial occlusion. SO-TA is paired with a diffusion-based sequence policy mapping observation windows to pose-action chunks. We evaluate SO-TA on three real-robot tasks: tight peg-in-hole assembly, BCM wiring-connector insertion, and curved-surface mark erasing. With ~200 rollouts per condition, SO-TA reaches 100% success on tight peg-in-hole versus 93% for cross-attention at matched capacity, and retains 82.5% success under illumination, distractor, and partial-occlusion perturbations where a concatenation baseline drops to 43.5%. OT-derived patch heatmaps and leave-one-out modality-influence ratios provide interpretable, phase-dependent diagnostics.

</details>


### [470] [Enhancing Graph-Based SLAM in GNSS-Denied environments by leveraging leg odometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20484)
*Léon Perruchot-Triboulet,Luc Jaulin,Kai Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合LiDAR惯性里程计与基于腿式运动学的本体感知里程计的因子图SLAM架构，显著降低了无GNSS环境下的高程漂移，提升了四足机器人在几何稀疏场景中的定位鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在无GNSS环境中，腿式机器人依赖的外感受传感器（如LiDAR）在几何稀疏或重复场景中易出现高程漂移，影响导航可靠性。

Method: 在LIO-SAM框架基础上，引入并行的基于腿运动学的本体感知里程计，并通过带选择性噪声模型的恒等相对位姿约束将其与主LiDAR-惯性里程计耦合，构建因子图优化架构。

Result: 在Linxai D50四足机器人上完成超1公里户外双回环实验，高程漂移由30米以上降至30厘米以内，并在基线方法完全失效的场景中实现成功收敛。

Conclusion: 已用于步态控制的本体感知数据可作为轻量、有效的垂直锚点，显著增强GNSS拒止环境下SLAM系统的鲁棒性与实用性。

Abstract: Autonomous navigation in GNSS-denied environments remains a core challenge for legged robots, where exteroceptive sensors such as LiDAR are prone to elevation drift in geometrically sparse or repetitive scenes. We present a factor graph architecture that augments the LIO-SAM framework with a parallel kinematic lane driven by proprioceptive leg odometry, coupled to the main LiDAR-inertial lane via an identity relative pose constraint with a selective noise model. Applied to a Linxai D50 quadruped platform across two outdoor loops totaling over one kilometer, our approach reduces elevation drift from over 30m to under 30cm and enables convergence in a scene where the baseline pipeline fails entirely. These results suggest that proprioceptive data, already computed onboard for gait control, constitutes a lightweight and effective vertical anchor for SLAM in GNSS-denied settings.

</details>


### [471] [The Yes-Man Syndrome: Benchmarking Abstention in Embodied Robotic Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20544)
*Doguhan Yeke,Elif Su Temirel,Ananth Shreekumar,Brandon Lee,Dongyan Xu,Z Berkay Celik*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出RoboAbstention框架，用于评估和提升视觉语言模型（VLMs）在具身机器人任务中的主动拒绝执行（abstention）能力，涵盖模糊、不可行或前提错误等指令场景，并构建可验证的基准数据集，发现当前前沿VLMs在此能力上仍存在显著不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM abstention研究多限于纯文本，未考虑具身机器人中感知接地性与物理约束带来的挑战，亟需面向真实机器人场景的abstention评估与建模方法。

Method: 提出具身机器人abstention分类法，并构建RoboAbstention框架：包含结构化视觉接地、确定性约束推导、类别特异性模板驱动的指令生成三阶段流程，基于5个机器人数据集生成可审计、可验证的abstention指令数据集。

Result: 在6069条基准指令上评测多个前沿VLMs，发现其abstention率普遍偏低（如Gemini Robotics ER 1.6 Preview仅16.5%）；通过防御性提示与上下文学习等干预，最高提升至93.6%（Gemini Robotics ER 1.6 Preview），但仍未能完全解决。

Conclusion: abstention是具身VLMs安全可靠部署的关键能力，当前模型严重不足；RoboAbstention为该方向提供了首个系统化、可扩展、可验证的评估与生成框架，并开源以推动后续研究。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are used as high-level planners for embodied agents, translating natural language instructions and visual observations into action plans. While prior work has studied abstention in LLMs, existing benchmarks are largely text-only and do not capture the perceptual grounding and physical constraints inherent to embodied robotics environments. In such settings, abstention requires recognizing when instructions are ambiguous, physically infeasible, based on false premises, or otherwise unresolvable given the available sensory modalities and context. To address this gap, we introduce a taxonomy to categorize abstention in the context of embodied robotics and present RoboAbstention, a scalable and auditable framework for generating abstention instructions grounded in images gathered from five robotics datasets. RoboAbstention instantiates the taxonomy through a three-phase pipeline: (1) structured visual grounding, (2) deterministic constraint derivation, and (3) controlled instruction generation via category-specific templates. This enables the construction of a diverse dataset with verifiable abstention conditions. We evaluate several frontier VLMs and find that all models exhibit significant weaknesses in abstention, including those with advanced reasoning capabilities. The best-performing model, Gemini 2.5 Flash, abstains on only 39.0% of our 6,069 benchmark instructions, while the embodied planner Gemini Robotics ER 1.6 Preview abstains on just 16.5%. We further explore methods for improving abstention in VLM planners, such as defensive prompting and in-context learning, and find that these interventions substantially improve performance, reaching 93.6% abstention rate for Gemini Robotics ER 1.6 Preview and 88.6% for GPT 5.4 Mini, yet no approach fully solves the problem. We open-source RoboAbstention at https://purseclab.github.io/RoboAbstention/.

</details>


### [472] [Fault-Tolerant, Rigidity-Preserving Control of Inflatable Truss Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20561)
*James Wade,Isaac Weaver,Mihai Stanciu,Nathan Usevitch*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向充气式等周长机器人桁架的容错控制框架，通过扩展运动学优化、引入离散时间控制屏障函数（DTCBF）约束及基于编码器反馈与正向运动学的状态估计实现闭环位置控制，显著提升了结构刚性保障下的工作空间保持率与跟踪精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 等周长机器人桁架在任务与环境适应中具有优势，但运行中电机故障会严重限制其功能，亟需容错控制方案。

Method: 1）扩展运动学优化以处理任意电机故障组合，施加等式约束禁用失效执行器；2）引入离散时间控制屏障函数（DTCBF）约束，数学上保障结构刚性并最大化工作空间利用；3）基于编码器反馈与正向运动学构建状态估计器，实现闭环位置控制。

Result: 在含6个执行器的2D桁架实验平台上验证：单电机故障下工作空间保持率超69%，闭环控制使跟踪精度提升超25%。

Conclusion: 所提容错控制框架为执行器降级条件下的等周长桁架机器人提供了更鲁棒、更具弹性的运行基础。

Abstract: Isoperimetric robotic trusses can adapt to different tasks and environments because they have a high strength-to-weight ratio, can change their own shape dramatically, and can be reconfigured into a variety of different shapes. However, motor failures in operational environments can severely limit operational capabilities if not properly addressed. This paper presents a fault-tolerant control framework for an inflatable robotic truss that maintains functionality despite motor failures, shown through three key contributions. First, we extend the kinematic optimization to handle arbitrary combinations of motor failures by imposing equality constraints to ensure failed actuators are not used. Second, we introduce discrete-time control barrier function (DTCBF) constraints that mathematically guarantee structural rigidity while maximizing workspace utilization, a critical requirement for reliable operation of truss robots under discrete-time control. Third, we implement closed-loop position control using onboard encoder feedback and a forward kinematics-based state estimator, improving positional accuracy in the presence of disturbances. We validate our approach through simulation and hardware experiments on a 2D isoperimetric truss testbed. For a 2D configuration with 6 actuators, we demonstrate >69% workspace preservation under single-motor failures and a >25% improvement in tracking accuracy with closed-loop control. These results establish a foundation for more robust and resilient isoperimetric truss robots operating under degraded actuation.

</details>


### [473] [Conflict-Aware Active Perception and Control in 3D Gaussian Splatting Fields via Control Barrier Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20566)
*Amirhossein Mollaei Khass,Athanasios Cosse,Vivek Pandey,Nader Motee*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）地图表示的冲突感知主动感知与控制框架，通过基于AV@R的风险感知控制屏障函数（CBF）保障安全，并结合风险感知期望信息增益（EIG）与感知屏障函数优化观测质量，在统一的安全关键二次规划中协调安全与感知目标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主动感知在不确定性环境中需兼顾安全导航与信息获取，但二者存在固有冲突：信息量大的视角常位于不确定性高、碰撞风险大的区域。

Method: 提出基于AV@R碰撞风险度量的控制屏障函数（CBF）保障安全性；设计风险感知的期望信息增益（EIG）作为视点选择准则，并引入感知屏障函数对齐相机朝向与局部信息梯度方向；构建统一的安全关键、感知感知二次规划（QP），以硬约束保证安全、软约束（松弛变量）处理感知目标。

Result: 仿真结果表明，该方法相比现有基于3DGS的方法，在提升安全性的同时也增强了信息获取能力。

Conclusion: 所提框架能有效协调安全与感知的冲突目标，在3DGS表征的不确定环境中实现安全且信息丰富的主动感知。

Abstract: Active perception in uncertain environments requires robots to navigate safely while acquiring informative observations to reduce map uncertainty. These objectives inherently conflict, as informative viewpoints often lie near uncertain regions with higher collision risk. To address this challenge, we develop a conflict-aware active perception and control framework for robotic systems operating in environments represented by 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Safety is enforced using a Control Barrier Function (CBF) derived from an Average Value-at-Risk AV@R collision-risk metric that accounts for geometric uncertainty and guarantees forward invariance of a safe set. To improve perception, we propose a risk-aware Expected Information Gain (EIG) formulation for selecting the next-best-view and introduce perception barrier functions that align the camera orientation with the local information-ascent direction. To obtain a tractable formulation for these conflicting safety and perception objectives, we propose a unified safety-critical, perception-aware quadratic program that enforces safety as a hard constraint while relaxing perception constraints through slack variables. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method improves both safety and information acquisition compared to existing 3DGS-based approaches.

</details>


### [474] [Jointly Learning Predicates and Actions Enables Zero-Shot Skill Composition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20648)
*Benedict Quartey,Sebastian Castro,Eric Rosen,Wil Thomason,George Konidaris,Stefanie Tellex*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Predicate Action Skills (PACTS)，一种联合建模动作轨迹与符号结果（谓词）的闭合式视觉运动策略，以提升技能组合泛化能力，并支持零样本技能规划与执行监控。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于示范学习（LfD）的方法难以在不重新训练的情况下泛化到已知技能的新组合；生成式策略仅建模动作分布，缺乏对所需符号结果的推理能力。

Method: 提出PACTS框架，将技能建模为动作轨迹与谓词信念轨迹的联合生成过程，采用闭合式visuomotor策略实现动作与符号结果的一致性 rollout，并利用在线谓词预测作为符号接口进行零样本技能规划与执行监控。

Result: PACTS能同时提升动作生成质量与谓词分类准确性；实验验证了其在零样本技能组合任务中的有效性，支持无需重训练的灵活规划与执行监控。

Conclusion: 联合建模动作与符号结果是提升机器人技能泛化与组合能力的关键，PACTS为可解释、可规划的具身智能提供了新范式。

Abstract: Learning from Demonstration (LfD) enables robots to learn complex behaviors from expert examples, yet existing approaches often fail to generalize to new compositions of known skills without retraining. Modern generative policies model distributions over action trajectories alone, thus are unable to reason about the symbolic outcomes required for robust composition. We propose that skills should jointly model action trajectories and the symbolic outcomes they induce. To address this gap, we introduce Predicate Action Skills (PACTS), a class of closed-loop visuomotor policies that model skills as a joint generative process over action and predicate belief trajectories, producing coherent action-outcome rollouts within a single model. Jointly generating actions and predicates enables PACTS to learn internal representations that improve both action generation and predicate classification. Furthermore, we demonstrate zero-shot composition of learned skills via planning by leveraging online predicate predictions from PACTS as a symbolic interface for sequencing and monitoring execution. Project website: https://planpacts.github.io/

</details>


### [475] [A Semantic and Occlusion-Aware GM-PHD Filter](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20666)
*Jovan Menezes,Mark Campbell*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习语义信息与遮挡感知的高斯混合概率假设密度（GM-PHD）滤波器出生模型，显著提升了复杂高密度驾驶场景下的多目标跟踪性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有出生模型常依赖简单或均匀假设，难以准确刻画新目标在遮挡区域和语义环境中的出现概率，限制了PHD滤波器在自动驾驶等复杂场景下的跟踪性能。

Method: 提出语义-遮挡感知（S-OA）出生模型，利用深度学习提取的语义信息，并显式建模遮挡区域，以更合理地初始化新目标；将该模型嵌入GM-PHD滤波框架；在蒙特卡洛仿真和KITTI数据集上进行验证。

Result: S-OA模型在遮挡严重场景下显著降低目标初始化延迟，在约70%的测试中达到或优于最强基线；评估指标包括首检到起始延迟、平均基数误差和OSPA距离；还进行了出生权重敏感性分析。

Conclusion: 将遮挡推理与语义先验融入贝叶斯跟踪框架，能有效提升自动驾驶中多目标跟踪的鲁棒性与准确性。

Abstract: This paper proposes a new birth model including semantic information derived from deep learning to create an occlusion-aware Gaussian Mixture Probability Hypothesis Density (GM-PHD) filter. Unlike prior approaches that rely on simplistic or uniform assumptions, the proposed Semantic-Occlusion Aware (S-OA) birth model defines initialization terms by explicitly considering regions of occlusion and by leveraging semantic information about the environment. This enables the filter to accurately represent where new objects are more likely to appear, thereby improving tracking performance in complex and high-density driving scenarios. The method is evaluated through Monte Carlo simulations and experiments on the KITTI dataset. Performance is assessed by measuring the latency between first detection and track initiation, along with the mean absolute cardinality error and the Optimal Subpattern Assignment (OSPA) metric. Results demonstrate that the S-OA birth model reduces initialization delay in occlusion-heavy settings, matching or outperforming the strongest baseline in approximately 70% of cases. A sensitivity analysis of birth model weights is also provided. Overall, the findings underscore the benefits of integrating occlusion reasoning and semantic priors into Bayesian tracking frameworks for autonomous driving.

</details>


### [476] [GaussianDream: A Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian World Model for Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20752)
*Zijian Zhang,Yuqing Jiang,Qian Cheng,Si Liu,Ding Zhao,Ping Luo,Weitao Zhou,Haibao Yu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出GaussianDream，一种即插即用的3D高斯世界模型插件，通过将机器人轨迹转化为结构化的时空监督信号，提升视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略在物理精确操控任务中的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准的动作模仿训练对3D几何、密集视觉结构和短时序环境演化缺乏显式监督，限制了物理精确操控能力。

Method: 提出GaussianDream，利用当前高斯重建与未来高斯预测耦合训练，学习一个可解码为可渲染3D高斯状态的紧凑时空前缀；训练中提供RGB、深度和伪3D场景流等稠密监督，推理时仅保留前缀以条件化动作生成，无需渲染或视频展开。

Result: 在LIBERO、RoboCasa Human-50和真实机器人任务上分别达到98.4%、52.6%和50.0%的成功率，表现强劲且具竞争力。

Conclusion: GaussianDream为VLA策略提供了高效、轻量且强监督的世界模型机制，在不增加推理开销的前提下显著提升操控精度与泛化能力。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) policies have advanced language-conditioned robotic manipulation by transferring semantic priors from pretrained vision-language models to action generation. Yet, standard action-imitation training often provides limited explicit supervision for 3D geometry, dense visual structure, and short-horizon environment evolution, which are critical for physically precise manipulation. We introduce \textbf{GaussianDream}, a feed-forward 3D Gaussian world-model plug-in that turns robot trajectories into structured spatial-temporal supervision. The key idea is to couple current Gaussian reconstruction with horizon-conditioned future Gaussian prediction during training, forcing a compact spatio-temporal prefix to be decodable into renderable 3D Gaussian states. This enables dense RGB rendering, depth, and pseudo 3D scene-flow supervision without requiring test-time Gaussian decoding. At inference, GaussianDream discards all auxiliary decoding heads and retains only the learned prefix to condition action generation, avoiding rendering, video rollout, or additional planning during closed-loop control. Experiments on LIBERO, RoboCasa Human-50, and real-robot tasks demonstrate strong and highly competitive performance, achieving \textbf{98.4\%} average success on LIBERO, \textbf{52.6\%} on RoboCasa Human-50, and \textbf{50.0\%} in real-world evaluation.

</details>


### [477] [VLA-REPLICA: A Low-Cost, Reproducible Benchmark for Real-World Evaluation of Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20774)
*Alex S. Huang,Jiahui Zhang,Shiqing Tang,Yu Xiang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了VLA-REPLICA，一个低成本、易复现的现实世界基准，用于评估视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在机器人操作任务中的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型的真实世界评估受限于缺乏可访问、可复现且一致的基准：仿真基准无法反映真实复杂性，而现有真实世界基准常需昂贵硬件、中心化评估或任务多样性不足。

Method: 构建基于现成组件的低门槛硬件系统VLA-REPLICA，支持快速搭建与跨实验室复现；设计涵盖分布内与分布外设置的真实世界评估协议，并提供多样化操作任务及小规模演示数据集用于目标域适配。

Result: 通过模仿学习和前沿VLA模型的实验，揭示了模型优缺点；多个独立搭建环境获得一致结果，验证了该基准的高可复现性。

Conclusion: VLA-REPLICA为VLA模型提供了标准化、低成本、高复现性的现实世界评估平台，有望推动该领域更可靠和可比的真实世界研究进展。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown strong promise for general-purpose robotic manipulation, but their real-world evaluation remains limited by a lack of accessible, reproducible, and consistent benchmarks. Simulation benchmarks fail to capture real-world complexity, while existing real-world benchmarks often require expensive hardware, centralized evaluation, or are limited in task diversity. We introduce VLA-REPLICA, a low-cost, easily reproducible real-world benchmark for evaluating VLA models. Built from off-the-shelf components, our system can be quickly assembled and replicated across laboratories, providing a consistent environment for policy evaluation anywhere in the world. VLA-REPLICA includes a diverse suite of manipulation tasks and a small-scale demonstration dataset for target-domain adaptation, with real-world evaluation protocols for both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings. Experiments with imitation learning and state-of-the-art VLA models reveal model strengths and limitations, while consistent results across independently constructed setups demonstrate the reproducibility of our benchmark.

</details>


### [478] [CMC-Opt: Constraint Manifold with Corners for Inequality-Constrained Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20796)
*Yetong Zhang,Frank Dellaert*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于流形的框架，用于解决机器人学中的等式与不等式约束优化问题，通过引入“带角约束流形”将原问题转化为直接在约束状态空间上的无约束优化，并扩展了流形优化算法以适配该结构，在大规模动力学规划任务中展现出优越性与鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人学中存在大量含混合非线性等式与不等式约束的优化问题，传统方法难以在复杂约束下保证解的有效性与可行性。

Method: 构建‘带角约束流形’以精确刻画满足混合约束的状态空间，并将标准流形优化算法拓展至该具有边界的拓扑结构上，实现约束空间内的直接无约束优化。

Result: 在大规模运动学-动力学联合规划任务中成功生成动态可行轨迹，而标准方法在此类问题上失效，验证了方法的有效性与鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 所提流形框架为处理复杂约束优化提供了新范式，突破了传统投影或罚函数方法的局限，具备理论严谨性与实际应用潜力。

Abstract: We introduce a manifold-based framework for addressing optimization problems with equality and inequality constraints found in robotics. Our approach transforms the original problem into an unconstrained optimization problem directly on the constrained state space. To achieve this, we introduce ``constraint manifolds with corners" to represent the state space satisfying mixed nonlinear equality and inequality constraints. We further extend manifold optimization algorithms to operate on this new topological structure. We demonstrate the power and robustness of our framework in the context of a large-scale kinodynamic planning problem, successfully generating dynamically feasible trajectories where standard methods fail.

</details>


### [479] [Q-SpiRL: Quantum Spiking Reinforcement Learning for Adaptive Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20801)
*Mohamed Khair Altrabulsi,Nouhaila Innan,Alberto Marchisio,Muhammad Kashif,Muhammad Shafique*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Q-SpiRL——一种面向动态环境障碍感知机器人导航的量子脉冲强化学习框架，核心为融合脉冲时序处理与变分量子特征变换的量子增强脉冲神经网络（QSNN），在多尺度网格世界中展现出最优的任务完成率、路径效率与运动平滑性平衡，并验证了其在IBM真实量子硬件上的部署可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态环境中自适应机器人导航需兼顾目标可达性、轨迹高效性与稳定性，传统方法在复杂动态障碍场景下存在性能瓶颈。

Method: 提出Q-SpiRL框架，构建并统一评估五类智能体：表格Q学习、经典MLP、经典SNN、量子增强MLP（QMLP）和量子增强脉冲神经网络（QSNN）；QSNN为核心，结合脉冲神经网络的时序处理能力与变分量子线路的特征变换能力；在20×20、30×30、40×40三种含静态/动态障碍的网格世界中进行训练与测试，采用确定性推理评估成功率达、成功加权路径长度、路径长度和转向率。

Result: QSNN在最复杂环境下达到最高99%的成功率，同时保持高路径效率与低转向率，整体权衡最优；并在IBM量子硬件上成功部署验证。

Conclusion: QSNN作为一种新型混合量子-脉冲神经架构，在动态导航任务中展现出显著优势，证明了量子增强脉冲学习在真实量子设备上解决具身智能问题的可行性与潜力。

Abstract: Adaptive robot navigation in dynamic environments requires policies that can reach the target reliably while producing efficient and stable trajectories. This paper presents Q-SpiRL, a quantum spiking reinforcement learning framework for obstacle-aware robot navigation. The framework develops and evaluates five agent families: tabular Q-learning, classical MLP, classical SNN, quantum-enhanced MLP (QMLP), and quantum-enhanced spiking neural network (QSNN). While all models are implemented under a unified training and evaluation pipeline, the QSNN is the central architecture of interest, as it combines spike-based temporal processing with variational quantum feature transformation. Experiments are conducted across three grid-world environments of increasing size, namely 20x20, 30x30, and 40x40, with both static and dynamic obstacles. Performance is assessed using success rate, success-weighted path length, path length, and turn rate under deterministic inference. Results show that QSNN achieves the strongest overall trade-off between task completion, trajectory efficiency, and motion smoothness, reaching up to 99% success rate while maintaining high path efficiency in the most challenging setting. Execution on IBM quantum hardware further demonstrates the feasibility of deploying the proposed hybrid policy under real-device conditions.

</details>


### [480] [Demo-JEPA: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture for One-shot Cross-Embodiment Imitation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20811)
*Jingyang He,Guangrun Li,Jieyu Zhang,Chengkai Hou,Zhengping Che,Shanghang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Demo-JEPA框架，将模仿学习从动作复现转向目标推断，通过JEPA世界模型将源端视觉演示映射为共享隐空间中的未来潜轨迹，供目标智能体基于自身动力学规划实现，从而实现跨形态的灵活模仿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人模仿学习依赖动作层面的对应，难以应对不同形态、运动学或动作空间的演示者与执行者之间的差异；本文旨在摆脱对共享动作空间或复杂重定向的依赖，转而从演示中推断意图（即目标状态）而非执行方式。

Method: 提出Demo-JEPA：基于JEPA（Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture）的世界模型，将源端视觉演示编码为共享预测表征空间中的未来潜轨迹；目标智能体将这些潜轨迹作为子目标，结合自身学习到的前向动力学进行规划执行；仅需视觉演示和目标智能体自身的交互经验，无需动作对齐或跨形态联合训练。

Result: 在RLBench仿真和真实世界操作任务中，Demo-JEPA性能媲美专用领域规划器，并能泛化至未见过的任务和形态配置，而此前方法在此类场景下失败。

Conclusion: Demo-JEPA通过解耦演示意图与具身执行，实现了真正意义上的跨形态模仿学习，为具身智能体的通用技能迁移提供了新范式。

Abstract: Robotic imitation learning is often treated as reproducing demonstrated actions, but actions are inherently embodiment-specific. When demonstrations come from humans or robots with different morphology, kinematics, or action spaces, this action-centric view requires shared action spaces, heuristic retargeting, or large-scale multi-embodiment co-training. We instead view demonstrations as implicit specifications of future goals: the target agent should infer what state the demonstrator is trying to realize, rather than how the demonstrator executes it. We propose Demo-JEPA, a cross-embodiment imitation framework that decouples demonstration intent from embodiment-specific execution. Built on a JEPA-based world model, Demo-JEPA translates source visual demonstrations into target-compatible future latent trajectories in a shared predictive representation space. The target agent then uses these latent trajectories as subgoals and realizes them through planning under its own learned forward dynamics. Because Demo-JEPA avoids action-level correspondence and requires only visual demonstrations plus the target agent's own interaction experience, it supports flexible imitation across heterogeneous embodiments. Experiments on RLBench and real-world manipulation tasks show that Demo-JEPA matches specialized in-domain planners and generalizes to unseen tasks and embodiment configurations where prior methods fail.

</details>


### [481] [SmoCap: Unified Scale-Pose Canonicalization with Proxy-Mapped Trust-Region QP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20850)
*Shihao Li,Naohiko Sugita*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SmoCap是一种泄漏抵抗的规范框架，通过在稀疏控制子空间中联合估计形态和姿态，解决了传统分阶段工作流导致的解剖学不一致问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统分阶段工作流（先模型缩放后逆运动学）易引发形态-姿态补偿，在弱观测方向产生解剖学不一致但数值上可接受的解，影响结果可靠性。

Method: SmoCap在局部信任域二次规划（QP）中联合估计形态与姿态，采用解析的代理映射姿态和尺度雅可比矩阵；低维代理映射稳定弱观测方向并驱动协同结构；可选预求解提供困难构型下的热启动。

Result: 在膝关节荧光透视数据上达到2.9度屈曲RMSE；人群人体测量终点误差约3%；泄漏审计中显著降低标记点RMSE、有限元误差及人体测量终点误差；瑜伽序列中脊柱运动保持表达性与协调性，拟合误差仅微增（+0.14 mm, +0.6%）；平均标记点RMSE约20 mm，单帧运行时间0.204–0.332 ms，迭代次数稳定为2–3次。

Conclusion: SmoCap提供了外部验证的、统一且耦合感知的尺度-姿态框架，使外部一致的动作规范在数据集规模上实用化。

Abstract: Objective: Stage-wise workflows that separate model scaling and inverse kinematics can induce morphology-posture compensation, resulting in anatomically inconsistent yet numerically acceptable solutions, especially in weakly observed directions. We present SmoCap, a leakage-resistant canonicalization framework that estimates morphology and posture jointly in each local trust-region quadratic program (QP) within a sparse control subspace. Methods: SmoCap solves a constrained trust-region QP with analytical proxy-mapped pose and scale Jacobians. The low dimensional proxy map stabilizes weakly observed directions and drives coordinated structures. An optional pre-solve provides warm starts in difficult configurations. The framework is evaluated using cohort fluoroscopy knee motion, anthropometric ground truth, and extreme yoga sequences. Results: SmoCap achieved 2.9 degree knee flexion RMSE against fluoroscopy, and a pooled anthropometric endpoint error around 3%. In the leakage audit against segment wise scaling, SmoCap also reduced marker RMSE, FE error, and anthropometric endpoint error. Proxy coupling preserved expressive and coordinated spine motion with marginal fitting error increase (+0.14 mm, +0.6%) against baseline models in yoga ablation. Median marker RMSE was around 20 mm, and median runtime was 0.204-0.332 ms/frame, achieved with consistently 2-3 iterations. Conclusion: SmoCap provides an externally validated unified coupling-aware scale-pose framework, making externally consistent motion canonicalization practical at dataset scale.

</details>


### [482] [DISC: Decoupling Instruction from State-Conditioned Control via Policy Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20856)
*Hanxiang Ren,Pei Zhou,Xunzhe Zhou,Yanchao Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DISC提出一种解耦语言指令与视觉观测的结构化方法：通过超网络仅从语言指令生成任务专用的视觉运动策略参数，从根本上防止观测泄漏；其两阶段超网络设计嵌入梯度优化结构作为归纳偏置，无需外部预训练即在多个基准上超越现有方法，并支持少样本适应和指令泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言条件化操作策略将指令与观测通过共享参数处理，导致‘观测泄漏’——模型绕过语言理解、直接利用视觉场景捷径生成动作，损害语言接地能力。

Method: DISC采用超网络架构，仅以语言指令为输入，生成整个任务专用的视觉运动策略参数；该策略本身不接触语言输入，从而强制任务意识完全来自语言；为解决高维权重生成难题，设计两阶段超网络，第二阶段嵌入梯度优化结构作为前馈归纳偏置，提升参数一致性。

Result: DISC在LIBERO-90和Meta-World上全面超越所有纠缠式基线，尤其在复杂长视野任务中优势扩大；在真实世界基准（所有任务视觉上下文相同）中显著优于对比方法，证实行为由语言生成的策略参数驱动；还展现出语义结构化的参数流形，支持少样本适应与指令改写鲁棒泛化。

Conclusion: DISC通过结构化解耦语言与观测，从根本上消除观测泄漏，证明无需大规模预训练即可实现强语言接地与泛化能力，为语言条件化机器人学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: Language-conditioned manipulation policies typically process instructions and observations through shared network parameters. This task-state entanglement provides a pathway for observation leakage -- networks learn scene-to-action shortcuts that bypass language grounding entirely. DISC eliminates this failure structurally. Rather than conditioning a universal policy on language, DISC uses a hypernetwork to generate the entire parameter set of a task-specific visuomotor policy from the instruction alone. The generated policy never directly accesses language; therefore, its task-awareness must come from the language. Consequently, observation leakage has no pathway to emerge. On the other hand, generating coherent high-dimensional policy weights is itself a challenging problem. We address it with a two-stage hypernetwork whose refinement stage embeds the structure of gradient-based optimization as a feed-forward inductive bias, producing globally consistent parameters without actual gradient computation. Trained entirely from scratch on standard data budgets, DISC outperforms all entangled baselines on LIBERO-90 and Meta-World, with advantages that widen on complex, long-horizon tasks -- and surpasses the large-scale pretrained $π_0$ despite using no external pretraining data. On a real-world benchmark where all tasks share identical visual context, DISC substantially outperforms entangled alternatives, directly confirming that language-generated policy parameters, not visual shortcuts, drive behavior. The hypernetwork further learns a semantically structured parameter manifold that enables few-shot adaptation from minimal demonstrations and robust generalization across paraphrased instructions. Our code is available at: {https://github.com/ReNginx/DISC}.

</details>


### [483] [Mobile UMI: Cross-View Diffusion Policy with Decoupled Kinematics for Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20894)
*Haoran Huang,Haonan Dong,Huixu Dong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Mobile UMI框架，通过双摄像头采集、ChArUco空间锚定与异步滚动执行，解决移动模仿学习中动作标签受运动干扰和推理延迟导致执行偏移的问题，在四项家庭任务中达到83.8%平均成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动模仿学习面临两个核心瓶颈：一是动作标签受机器人本体运动（如行走）污染，难以分离操作与导航；二是生成式策略推理延迟导致执行时位姿已偏移，需频繁后退修正。现有腕戴或体戴设备均无法兼顾全局导航上下文与局部操作精度，且未解决延迟对执行的影响。

Method: Mobile UMI包含三部分：1）双摄像头系统（胸挂+手腕）在无机器人情况下分别采集全局（胸视角）与局部（手视角）视觉-惯性数据；2）基于ChArUco的一次性空间标定，将手部位姿统一到胸坐标系，解耦出SE(3)操作轨迹与SE(2)基座轨迹；3）异步滚动执行器在线匹配当前物理位姿，实时丢弃过期路径点并重对齐动作块。

Result: 在四个长周期家庭任务上进行100次/任务的测试，平均成功率达83.8%；对照实验表明，仅使用胸坐标系标签即可显著提升性能，而在线状态匹配进一步补齐剩余差距；相比ACT和Diffusion Policy，无需修改策略架构即实现更优效果。

Conclusion: 在所测试的移动模仿学习场景下，显式的运动学解耦（kinematic factorization）结合状态级延迟对齐（state-level latency alignment），是一种不依赖策略架构改动的有效解决方案。

Abstract: Mobile imitation learning on portable demonstration interfaces faces two coupled bottlenecks: locomotion-contaminated action labels and inference-induced execution latency on a continuously moving base. Recent wrist-mounted interfaces lower the cost of tabletop data collection, yet a single wrist view does not capture the global context required for base navigation. Adding a body-mounted camera entangles human walking with hand motion. Meanwhile, generative policies introduce hundreds of milliseconds of inference latency, during which the base advances past predicted waypoints, forcing backward corrections at action splices. This paper presents Mobile UMI, a hardware-free demonstration framework that addresses both gaps through three components. First, a dual-camera capture system records chest-centric global context and wrist-centric local interaction without any robot present.
